title: tryonia schwackeana
intro: Tryonia schwackeana, also known as Strychnos schwackeana, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is a tropical tree native to Brazil, known for its toxic seeds and medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids that have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the seeds are prepared as a tincture or decoction for medicinal purposes, but caution is advised due to the plant's toxicity.
